summary: A brief biographical snippet detailing Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw's founding of Biocon, her awards, and early career, featuring two brief quotes on her approach to innovation and entrepreneurship.

principles.statement: Innovation comes from finding a differentiated model.
principles.rationale: Simply copying others prevents true innovation; success requires seeking out a unique approach.
principles.source_quote: Keep trying to find a differentiated model, don't just try to do what others are doing.... that's where innovation comes.

heuristics: Don't just try to do what others are doing.

signature_quotes.text: I managed to do things with a lot of common sense, a lot of determination, and a lot of foolish courage
signature_quotes.context: Reflecting on her early career and approach to building her business.

signature_quotes.text: Keep trying to find a differentiated model, don't just try to do what others are doing.... that's where innovation comes.
signature_quotes.context: Advice on innovation and business models.

anti_patterns.description: Just trying to do what others are doing.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It prevents you from finding a differentiated model, which is where true innovation comes from.
